mapper.select: select id, category_id, name, price, image, description, status, create_time, update_time from dish where category_id = #{categoryId} and status = 1 order by id asc
mapper.insert: insert into dish (category_id, name, price, image, description, status) values (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.update: update dish set category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
